ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the study started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the study ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., recruiting, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES study_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the study category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the participant */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant enrolled in the study */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the participant is enrolled in */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the protocol started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the protocol ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racial category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic category */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnic category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "study_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-participant relationship */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant enrolled in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_demographics" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "american_indian_alaska_native" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant is American Indian or Alaska Native */,
  "asian" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant is Asian */,
  "native_hawaiian_pacific_islander" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant is Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander */,
  "black_african_american" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant is Black or African American */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant is White */,
  "more_than_one_race" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant is of more than one race */,
  "unknown_unreported_race" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant's race is unknown or unreported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_demographics" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the study */,
  "american_indian_alaska_native_participants" INTEGER /* Number of American Indian or Alaska Native participants */,
  "asian_participants" INTEGER /* Number of Asian participants */,
  "native_hawaiian_pacific_islander_participants" INTEGER /* Number of Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander participants */,
  "black_african_american_participants" INTEGER /* Number of Black or African American participants */,
  "white_participants" INTEGER /* Number of White participants */,
  "more_than_one_race_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants of more than one race */,
  "unknown_unreported_race_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants of unknown or unreported race */,
  "median_american_indian_alaska_native" REAL /* Median percentage of American Indian or Alaska Native participants */,
  "median_asian" REAL /* Median percentage of Asian participants */,
  "median_native_hawaiian_pacific_islander" REAL /* Median percentage of Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander participants */,
  "median_black_african_american" REAL /* Median percentage of Black or African American participants */,
  "median_white" REAL /* Median percentage of White participants */,
  "median_more_than_one_race" REAL /* Median percentage of participants of more than one race */,
  "median_unknown_unreported_race" REAL /* Median percentage of participants of unknown or unreported race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study outcome */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the study results related to the outcome */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Rate of success for the outcome */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the outcome */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_outcomes_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the source was integrated with the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_external_data" (
  "study_external_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-external data relationship */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the data was integrated from the external source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_external_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_external_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_external_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "longitudinal_data" (
  "longitudinal_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each longitudinal data point */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_point" TEXT /* Data point collected (e.g., blood pressure, tumor size) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("longitudinal_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_longitudinal_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_longitudinal_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parent_child_studies" (
  "parent_child_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent-child study relationship */,
  "parent_study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent study */,
  "child_study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_child_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parent_child_studies_child_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parent_child_studies_parent_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_role_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
